description: Maps every paper claim to artifact. All experimental claims verified from JSON result files. Theoretical claims in tool_paper.tex. Property tests in test_property_invariants.py, test_distributional.py, and test_pathb.py. PATH B improvements: SMT/ILP encoding, entropy bias correction, cross-model analysis (10 families, 45 pairs), lattice structure, failure taxonomy, information-theoretic baselines (NMI, VI), corrected Theorem 4.1 (100% verified, Clopper-Pearson CI [0.964, 1.000]), corrected Corollary 4.3 (100% verified), Berry-Esseen convergence rate (C₀≤0.4748), submodularity verified beyond n≤8.

claims.claim: FarthestPoint spread 10.64±0.20 vs Random 7.83±0.57 (n=200, d=50, k=10, 30 trials)
FP vs Random: t=28.3, p<10^-35, Cohen's d=7.42
FarthestPoint D-2=0.982 vs Random D-2=0.713 on text (38% improvement)
Fair diversity retention 97.9%, 95% CI [97.5%, 98.2%]
Worst-case fair retention ≥ 94.5% across all constraint levels
Theorem 4.1: Tight bound |τ| ≥ 1 - 2(ε₁ + ε₂) with constructive tightness proof
claims.evidence: Proof in paper Section 3.5; corrected from incorrect ε₁ε₂ term; tightness verified in test_distributional.py; 100/100 pass rate (Clopper-Pearson 95% CI [0.964, 1.000])

claims.claim: Corollary 4.3: metric equivalence classes are transitive when ε < δ/4
claims.evidence: Corollary in paper; verified 50/50 (100%) using measured pair-level ε values; bug fixed: element-level swaps replaced with pair-level discordance measurement

claims.claim: Berry-Esseen convergence rate: |P(Zₙ ≤ t) - Φ(t)| ≤ 0.4748/√n (Shevtsova 2011)
claims.evidence: Proposition in paper; implemented in distributional_analysis.berry_esseen_kendall_tau(); Gaussian reliable at n≥8

claims.claim: Proposition: Selector-fairness compositionality preserves (1-1/e) approximation
SMT/ILP exact optimality gaps: greedy suboptimal in 16.7% of instances, mean gap 0.95%, max gap 5.72%
Certified fair retention ≥ 96.8% (mean 98.8%) via SMT exact solution
Miller-Madow corrected entropy: high-diversity H_MM=9.81 bits (MLE bias +0.61 bits)
KL divergence reduced from 23.03 bits (raw) to 0.65 bits (Laplace smoothed) — 97.2% reduction due to zero-mass tail domination
BCa bootstrap CI [8.57, 11.06] contains point estimate 9.81 — fixes CI/point-estimate inconsistency
Cross-model meta τ = 0.33 (95% CI [0.32, 0.34]) across 10 model families (45 pairs), power = 0.61
MetricAlgebra M/~_δ forms lattice at δ=0.3 with β₀=5, β₁=0, 2 automorphisms
13 failure modes across 6 categories (5 high severity) with structural causes and mitigations
NP-hardness of fair diversity selection by reduction from Max-k-Dispersion (Hassin, Rubinstein, Tamir 1997)
Sum-pairwise-distance is NOT submodular in general
Facility-location IS submodular (exhaustive for n≤8; random sampling with Clopper-Pearson CI for n>8)
Tests: 83/83 pass (53 PATH B, 12 distributional, 18 property invariant)
